meta.description: Context management skill trajectory analysis mined from Liminal telemetry
meta.methodology: Session depth gradient, human message keyword analysis, frustration-to-automation latency, commit sentiment, era intensity, agent handoff economics

context_management_trajectory.summary: Simon's context management improved dramatically across the 32-day project, but the improvement was NON-LINEAR — it came in sudden breakthroughs rather than gradual refinement. The data shows three distinct phases of context skill evolution.

evidence: Hallucination frustration: 24h latency to build session-restore system
0 context management hooks existed before Era 3
Context dump messages contain raw task notifications (not curated context)
phases.skill_level: Beginner — treats context as something the AI should handle, gets frustrated when it doesn't
phases.key_learning: Context is not automatic — you must actively manage what the AI knows

evidence: 80 micromanagement messages vs 21 trust-delegation messages (3.8:1 ratio)
Context dump frequency drops — but session_count spikes to 27 (fragmented sessions)
Compaction mentions: 72 — actively managing context windows
phases.skill_level: Intermediate — overcompensates by giving too much context, checking everything manually
phases.key_learning: More context is not better context. Quality and specificity matter more than quantity.

evidence: Era 7: 0.85 messages/commit — 11.6x reduction from Era 4 peak
Session bytes/session peaks at 24735 (Era 7) — RICHER sessions with FEWER messages
Meta-cognition: 135 messages — actively recognizing and naming patterns
Only 2 context-loss messages in entire project — near-zero by end
phases.skill_level: Advanced — gives precise, high-signal instructions and trusts the agent to execute
phases.key_learning: Trust the agent with clear intent, intervene only when patterns repeat

tools_actively_used.evidence: 26 hooks created, all 9 frustration-derived hooks still active
tools_actively_used.verdict: CORE TOOL — Primary meta-cognitive instrument. Externalizes lessons into permanent enforcement.
CORE TOOL — Planning manages context BEFORE entering execution mode. Essential for ADHD working memory.
CORE TOOL — Persistent memory across sessions. Directly addresses context loss.
EFFECTIVE BUT COSTLY — Works but requires manual effort.

tools_actively_used.evidence: 21 files, soup mode active, seed injection wired
tools_actively_used.verdict: NICHE TOOL — Useful for creative coding workflows only.

tools_that_are_bloat.recommendation: Consolidate to single coordination system (harness pattern).

tools_that_are_bloat.verdict: PARTIAL BLOAT — CreativeEvaluator is active, others may be redundant
tools_that_are_bloat.recommendation: Audit which evaluator is in the hot path.

tools_that_are_bloat.verdict: BLOAT — HarnessMemory is active, art memories may not be exercised
ARCHITECTURAL DEBT — accumulated through refactoring without cleanup
tools_that_are_bloat.recommendation: Single generator interface with strategy pattern.

tools_that_are_bloat.files: plugins, learning, improvement, gui, sandbox, export, ui, etc.
tools_that_are_bloat.verdict: MIXED — Some legitimate (constants), some stubs (learning, improvement)

key_insight.title: The Context Management Inversion
key_insight.summary: Simon improved NOT by learning to manage context better, but by learning to NEED less context. The trajectory from 9.90 to 0.85 messages/commit represents a fundamental shift: from 'I need to tell the AI everything' to 'I can describe what I want precisely and trust the agent.' Clear intent beats comprehensive context.
evidence_chain: Era 3: 'Anything that is not wired up needs to be wired up' — vague, comprehensive, frustrated
Era 5: Specific feature requests — 'ChatCLI with split-view terminal UI'
Era 7: 0.85 msg/commit — 'Voice-to-visual parameter mapping' — 5 words, 13 files created
Era 9: 'THE_BIBLE documentation' — naming convention becomes the instruction
key_insight.implication_for_learning: Study PRECISION INSTRUCTION WRITING (how to say more with less) rather than CONTEXT MANAGEMENT (how to preserve more state). Context problem is solved through infrastructure. Remaining growth: writing maximally dense intent.

frustration_to_skill_timeline.evidence: Context loss: 2 total, both early eras. Zero by Era 7+.
Wiring mentions drop after Era 4. Later infra wired end-to-end from start.
Era 8 Dogfood Crucible: runs system against itself. Verification becomes proactive.

frustration_to_skill_timeline.skill: Self-improving systems (Meta-Harness observes own failures, rewrites own code)
frustration_to_skill_timeline.evidence: Meta-Harness with 7 self-repair tools. Broken system becomes self-fixing.
